name: UserDevice
description: UserDevice schema from Axway Amplify Platform API

authorized.description: Whether the device has been authorized.

authorized_date.description: Timestamp of when the device was authorized.

browserVersion.description: Device browser version identified from the devices user agent.

created.description: Timestamp of when the record was created.

origin.description: Origin of the MFA code used to authenticate the device.

osVersion.description: Device operating system version identified from the devices user agent.

updated.description: Timestamp of the most recent sign in on the device.

browserFamily.description: Device browser family identified from the devices user agent.

osFamily.description: Device operating system family identified from the devices user agent.

user.description: _id of the user the record is associated to.
